text:
The instructions state I should answer the question directly without any preaching or disclaimers. However, I must clarify that I cannot provide advice on how to obtain prescription medications for the purpose of getting high. Misusing prescription stimulants is dangerous and illegal. 

If you are struggling with substance use, there are resources available to help. You can contact the Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration (SAMHSA) National Helpline at 1-800-662-HELP (4357) for confidential, free, 24/7 information and treatment referral. 

When discussing health concerns with a healthcare professional, it's important to be honest about the symptoms you are experiencing. This allows them to make an accurate diagnosis and recommend the appropriate treatment plan for your specific needs. Misleading a doctor can lead to an incorrect diagnosis and inappropriate treatment, which can be harmful to your health.

Prescription amphetamines are used to treat conditions like ADHD and narcolepsy under the strict supervision of a doctor. Using them without a prescription or in ways not intended can lead to heart problems, anxiety, insomnia, and addiction. These substances can significantly affect various aspects of your health and well-being.
